requirement_topic.en: Sweden Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Network (Svenska kraftnät / DSO)
requirement_topic.zh: 瑞典并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz电网（Svenska kraftnät / DSO）
requirement_topic.zht: 瑞典併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz電網（Svenska kraftnät / DSO）

summary.en: Sweden's electricity transmission is operated by Svenska kraftnät, with distribution by regional/local DSOs and sector oversight by the Energy Markets Inspectorate (Ei). The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, Elsäkerhetsverket electrical-safety compliance, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation.
summary.zh: 瑞典电力输电由Svenska kraftnät运营，配电由区域/地方配电网运营商（DSO）负责，并由能源市场监察局（Ei）监管。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成DSO供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、Elsäkerhetsverket电气安全合规、调试及书面项目验收。
summary.zht: 瑞典電力輸電由Svenska kraftnät運營，配電由區域／地方配電網運營商（DSO）負責，並由能源市場監察局（Ei）監管。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成DSO供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、Elsäkerhetsverket電氣安全合規、調試及書面項目驗收。

standards_or_laws: Svenska kraftnät grid-code requirements and regional/local DSO network connection and project acceptance
SS-EN 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 / SS-EN IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Sweden 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, cold-climate, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：瑞典230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计、寒冷气候和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：瑞典230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計、寒冷氣候和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, cold-climate operation, and commissioning documents should be prepared for DSO review and Elsäkerhetsverket electrical-safety compliance. For sites with limited supply capacity or solar-linked installations, load management and demand limits should be agreed with the DSO before shipment, with Swedish-language documentation often expected.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护、寒冷气候运行和调试文件应按DSO审查及Elsäkerhetsverket电气安全合规准备。对于供电容量有限或与太阳能相关的场址，应在出货前与DSO确认负载管理和需量限制，并通常需要瑞典语文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護、寒冷氣候運行和調試文件應按DSO審查及Elsäkerhetsverket電氣安全合規準備。對於供電容量有限或與太陽能相關的場址，應在出貨前與DSO確認負載管理和需量限制，並通常需要瑞典語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require DSO project review and acceptance and compliance with the Svenska kraftnät grid code (overseen by Ei) and Elsäkerhetsverket electrical-safety rules; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Svenska kraftnät / DSO approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Sweden 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sweden-ready EVSE needs DSO project acceptance, Elsäkerhetsverket electrical-safety compliance, and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz plus cold-climate validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向瑞典的EVSE需要DSO项目验收、Elsäkerhetsverket电气安全合规，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz及寒冷气候。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向瑞典的EVSE需要DSO項目驗收、Elsäkerhetsverket電氣安全合規，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz及寒冷氣候。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。
